status.text: Client library failed to create semaphore. This is an internal error.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: Client library failed to create pipe. This is an internal error.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: A synchronization function was called but there was no pending action. This is an internal error.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: Failed to read from pipe. This is an internal error.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: Failed to launch process %1%/%2%. This is an internal error.
status.description:
On occasion, the ixia client library launches additional processes in addition to the main client application. If the process launch fails this error is presented along with the name of the executable that could not be launched.
This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support. and include the error details from the error.

status.text: The file %1% could not opened for reading.
status.description: Please check if the file exists and is so check the file permissions for reading.

status.text: Unable to resolve hostname %1%.
status.description: Unable to resolve hostname. Please check spelling and network connectivity.

status.text: Cannot connect to Test Server on host '%1%', port %2%, please check User Settings and make sure Test Server process is running.
status.description: Unable to connect to Test Server.Make sure testserver.exe is running and check your configuration.

status.text: TCP connection lost.
status.description: TCP connection lost. Please check network connectivity.

status.text: Index out of range.
status.description: The index used to access an array is out of bounds.

status.text: There was an error parsing an Xml message. The received object id didn't match.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: The document element was not correct.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.
The Response xml received from the test server was malfored in some way and could not be parsed by the client side xml parser

status.text: The specified property '%1%'does not exist in this objct.
status.description: The specified property does not exist in this objct. This is an internal error if it occurred in an application.

status.text: The specified property has the wrong type.
status.description: The specified property has an unexpected type. This is an internal error if it occurred in an application.

status.text: The server does not support this feature.
status.description: The server this client is connected to does not support this feature. The client is newer than the server.

status.text: Failed to initialize winsock.
status.description: Failed to initialize winsock.

status.text: Failed to create socket.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: Failed to set socket option.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: Ran out of new object ids.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: Object deleted.
status.description: The accessed object has been previously deleted.

status.text: The assignment is invalid.
status.description: The assignment is invalid because the source object has no ancestors of the target type.

status.text: The message file format of file %1% is wrong. This is an internal error.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: An unspecific internal error has occurred.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: Deadlock condition detected.
status.description: Deadlock condition detected. Attempted to call sync method from communication thread.

status.text: This method has not been implemented.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.

status.text: Timeout.
status.description: This is an internal error. Please contact Ixia technical support.
